title: hatiora epiphylloides subsp. bradei
intro: Hatiora epiphylloides subsp. bradei is a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae, commonly known as a type of epiphytic cactus. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hatiora epiphylloides subsp. bradei include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, thanks to its antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
